camila_intro_inez.speaker: Inez
camila_intro_inez.text: Camila! It's great to see you. I'm showing our newest archeologist around town.

camila_intro_camila.speaker: Camila
camila_intro_camila.text: I heard your team was getting a new recruit. Its nice to meet you, I'm the museum director, Camila.

camila_intro_player.speaker: Player
camila_intro_player.text: Its nice to meet you, too.

camila_intro_fossils.speaker: Camila
camila_intro_fossils.text: Did you find anything the museum might be interested in today?

camila_intro_wow.speaker: Camila
camila_intro_wow.text: Wow, what a find! I work every night, so if you have anything to turn in, or you just want to chat, feel free to come talk to me.

choices.text: Why is the town called Amaranth Heights?

camila_town_name.speaker: Camila
camila_town_name.text: Amaranths aren't native to this area. Allegedly, there was a patch of them growing out by your dig sites when the town was founded, but I'm not sure how true that is.

camila_strange_fossil.speaker: Camila
camila_strange_fossil.text: Do you have it with you?

camila_strange_fossil_2.speaker: Camila
camila_strange_fossil_2.text: Its an old bone of some kind, but it's not the kind of thing we would display here.

camila_strange_fossil_3.speaker: Camila
camila_strange_fossil_3.text: Why don’t you keep it? If you find more, maybe I can get you more information.

camila_day2_welcome.speaker: Camila
camila_day2_welcome.text: Welcome to the Museum! What can I help you with today?

camila_day2_submit.speaker: Camila
camila_day2_submit.text: Thanks for getting these over here. They look great!

camila_day2_after.speaker: Camila
camila_day2_after.text: Welcome to the Museum! What can I help you with today?

camila_day2_fossil_3.speaker: Camila
camila_day2_fossil_3.text: Hm. If you find more, bring them all over to the museum. Maybe we can piece them together.

camila_poppy_explain.speaker: Camila
camila_poppy_explain.text: Ah... everything he says is nonsense.

camila_poppy_explain2.speaker: Camila
camila_poppy_explain2.text: Since I remember, Poppy has been coming in here spouting some theory or another about this town. None of them have any real backing.

camila_strange_fossil6.speaker: Camila
camila_strange_fossil6.text: Look.. when we put these together...

camila_strange_fossil10.speaker: Player
camila_strange_fossil10.text: How long ago was Amaranth Heights founded?

camila_strange_fossil11.speaker: Camila
camila_strange_fossil11.text: ..These look much older than its founding.

camila_strange_fossil13.speaker: Camila
camila_strange_fossil13.text: We need to see exactly when this is from. It could change everything we know about this town’s history...

camila_strange_fossil14.speaker: Camila
camila_strange_fossil14.text: I should be done [color=#16C1DE]tomorrow[/color]. Come by then.
